summary: Verified vercel.json bug fix (rootDirectory removal). Created /app/backend/tests/test_vercel_config.py with 9 regression assertions covering: file location, JSON validity, absence of rootDirectory key/string, installCommand/buildCommand scoping into frontend/, outputDirectory=frontend/build, framework=create-react-app, github.silent preserved, immutable cache header preserved, and frontend build script intact. All 9 tests pass. Also ran the actual build pipeline (cd /app/frontend && yarn build) to confirm no regression — built successfully in 28.95s and produced /app/frontend/build/index.html plus static/js/main.*.js bundles. Bug fix verified end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: vercel.json is clean: framework=create-react-app, installCommand='cd frontend && yarn install --frozen-lockfile', buildCommand='cd frontend && yarn build', outputDirectory='frontend/build'. The schema-rejected rootDirectory property is fully removed (verified both via JSON-key check and full-text scan).
Cache-Control immutable header for /static/(.*) preserved with max-age=31536000.
File is at repo root /app/vercel.json (not inside /app/frontend/), as required by Vercel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: vercel.json is verified clean and the production build pipeline (cd frontend && yarn build) works. Regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_vercel_config.py and can be re-run anytime via: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_vercel_config.py -v.
rca of the issue: RCA: Vercel's vercel.json schema (https://openapi.vercel.sh/vercel.json) does not permit the `rootDirectory` property — that setting is dashboard-only. Previously the file used `rootDirectory: "frontend"` to point Vercel at the React subdir, which caused the deploy to fail schema validation. Fix: removed rootDirectory and instead scoped each command into the subdir contextually: installCommand and buildCommand now begin with `cd frontend &&`, and outputDirectory is set to the relative path `frontend/build`. Reproduction (pre-fix): deploy with rootDirectory present → Vercel schema validator rejects build. Mitigation (post-fix): all schema-legal keys; verified by 9 unit assertions and a successful local yarn build producing build/index.html.
